The attention f16kv patch mixes workgroup and tiling policy changes into a dtype variant asset.
tools audit review started
Distill studio quality gate weakens numeric constraints when flags are present without values instead of rejecting malformed input.
Distill studio quality gate weakens numeric constraints when flags are present without values instead of rejecting malformed input.
Added KNOWN_BOOLEAN_FLAGS and KNOWN_VALUE_FLAGS sets; unknown flags and stray positional arguments now throw.
Rechecked: CLI validation confirmed rejecting unknown flags.
Added VALID_SURFACES set; unknown flags and extra positionals now throw; empty surface no longer silently normalized to auto.
Rechecked: CLI validation confirmed rejecting unknown flags and invalid surfaces.
inferPresetFromCatalogModel now requires explicit model.preset; resolveRuntimeModelType no longer catches errors.
Rechecked: heuristic pattern matching removed; explicit preset required.
strictCompareArtifacts default changed from false to true.
Rechecked: strict artifact comparison now enforced by default.
Unknown --suite now throws instead of silently falling back to all.
Rechecked: unknown suite throws with actionable error.
Unknown --suite in coverage runner now throws instead of silently falling back to all.
Rechecked: unknown suite throws with actionable error.
Explicit require checks added for trainingSchemaVersion, trainingBenchSteps, teacherModelId, studentModelId, distillDatasetId, distillLanguagePair; JS fallback strings removed.
Rechecked: all distill bench required fields enforced explicitly.
Explicit require checks added for trainingSchemaVersion, trainingBenchSteps, seed, and non-empty trainingTests array.
Rechecked: UL bench required fields enforced explicitly.
Missing latentDataset.count is now null with incomplete:true instead of coercing to 0.
Rechecked: missing count emits null delta with incomplete flag.
Unknown --flags and extra positional arguments now throw.
Rechecked: CLI rejects unknown flags and extra positionals.
loadFixtureMap now only catches ENOENT; parse and permission errors propagate.
Rechecked: fixture map parse errors now propagate correctly.
Root-level readdir errors now throw instead of silently returning.
Rechecked: root readdir failures throw with actionable error.
Added VALID_STAGES validation after parseArgs; invalid stage throws.
Rechecked: invalid stage is rejected with actionable error.
Two-phase write: collect all generated content first, only write files if no errors.
Rechecked: partial writes no longer possible when variant generation errors occur.
resolveText and resolveTextArray now throw on invalid non-null/non-undefined values.
Rechecked: invalid text/array values now rejected explicitly.
Added parseRatio [0,1] and parsePositiveMs >0 validators for numeric CLI flags.
Rechecked: invalid ratio and latency values rejected with actionable errors.
Remote registry is now fetched and validated before the artifact upload, preventing partial publication on registry access failure.
Rechecked: registry pre-validation confirmed before artifact upload.
validateRegistryPayload now checks workloadKind, trainingSchemaVersion, and seed against registry entries.
Rechecked: contract fields validated against registry on every verify run.
Config already has explicit trainingSchemaVersion, trainingBenchSteps, seed, and trainingTests; finding addressed by run-ul-bench.mjs requiring all fields explicitly.
Rechecked: config is compliant and run-ul-bench.mjs now rejects missing required fields.
Config already has explicit trainingSchemaVersion, trainingBenchSteps, seed, and trainingTests; finding addressed by run-ul-bench.mjs requiring all fields explicitly.
Rechecked: config is compliant and run-ul-bench.mjs now rejects missing required fields.
Added WGSL comment to generated topk_f16 variant documenting that only softmax_topk is exported; main and topk_2_small are not present.
Rechecked: entry-point contract is now explicit in the generated variant.
Added change-category comment to generated attention_f16 variant separating dtype changes from performance overrides.
Rechecked: dtype vs. performance override separation is now documented in the generated variant.
Added change-category comment to generated attention_f16kv variant separating dtype changes from performance overrides.
Rechecked: dtype vs. performance override separation is now documented in the generated variant.
parseNumber fallback removed for --min-steps; || 1 coercion replaced with ?? 1 to stop silently coercing 0 to 1.
Rechecked: malformed numeric input for --min-steps now propagates correctly instead of silently defaulting.
